title: callistachys lanceolata
intro: Callistachys lanceolata, also known as the dragon's blood tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, known for its unique, red sap which resembles blood. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callistachys lanceolata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's sap is often extracted and used in the form of tinctures, capsules, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
